docs.text: .md-typeset h1, .md-content__button {display: none;} Welcome, and thanks for visiting this portfolio. I am cognitive science student at RPI. Outside of school, I work at an aerospace/defense contractor doing ML R&D, specifically pertaining to ontology based systems engineering. At the moment, my main personal endeavor involves starting a company and open source intelligence organization . I spend the rest of my free time time writing, programming, and working on assorted projects. You can find more information about these on my blog .
